title: PARACITY Clear Glass Mugs Set of 2, 420ml Large Glass Coffee/Tea Cups with Handle, Hot/Cold Drink, Latte, Cappuccino, Tea, Juice, Beer
features: LARGE CAPACITY: The clear coffee mug holds 14 oz, perfect for large capacity serving latte, cappuccino, hot drinks, espresso and tea. The clear glass coffee mugs satisfies the habit of drinking a lot of water and avoids repeated water addition.

HEAT AND COLD RESISTANT: The glass mugs is made of borosilicate glass, thick and durable, lead-free. The clear glass coffee mugs can withstand temperatures from -4 to 302 degree F. You can microwave your drink to heat glass mugs up quickly, or simply freeze clear coffee mug to enjoy your favorite ice-cold beverage. Dishwasher safe.

UNIQUE CRAFTSMANSHIP: The glass coffee mugs is hand blown with a smooth and seamless finish. The wide mouth of the clear glass coffee mugs is easy to clean and the sturdy handle is easy to hold. The raised bottom of the clear coffee mug keeps your glass mugs to lay flat on the table without wobbling.

NICE GIFT: The clear coffee mug has a beautiful gift box. Our packaging ensures the glass coffee mugs arrive unbroken. So the glass tea cups can be a great gift for friends, family, glass and coffee lovers on special days like Thanksgiving, Christmas, Conservatory party.
